raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered a XXXX monitor on XX/XX/year> using my American Express business card. XXXX stated that it was delivered a few days later but the delivery photo doesn't show my door or any address at all. XXXX claims that it was delivered and there's nothing they can do. AMEX keeps siding with XXXX despite not having proof that it was delivered. 

It never arrived to my address and American Express keeps denying my disputes with no explanation or solution.
